name: Olga Discordia, Dark Elf Queen
description:
The prideful queen of the dark elves, known for her long black hair and listless expression. From the hentai anime: Kuroinu.

Update 07/22/2024: As of this date, this bot is completely up to date and is just as good as my latest bots, so feel free to chat with the new and improved Dark Elf Queen!


This bot works just as good as my latest ones despite being my first bot ever made, and that's because I've revamped it and gave it an up-to-date character definition.
